tools.name: audio.addTrackCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint adds one or more tracks to a collection by track IDs.

tools.name: audio.createTrackCollection
tools.description: This endpoint creates one or more collections (soundboxes). To add tracks, use `POST /v2/audio/collections/{id}/items`.

tools.name: audio.deleteTrackCollection
tools.description: This endpoint deletes a collection.

tools.name: audio.deleteTrackCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint removes one or more tracks from a collection.

tools.name: audio.downloadTracks
tools.description: This endpoint redownloads tracks that you have already received a license for. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: audio.getTrack
tools.description: This endpoint shows information about a track, including its genres, instruments, and other attributes.

tools.name: audio.getTrackCollection
tools.description: This endpoint gets more detailed information about a collection, including the number of items in it and when it was last updated. To get the tracks in collections, use `GET /v2/audio/collections/{id}/items`.

tools.name: audio.getTrackCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint lists the IDs of tracks in a collection and the date that each was added.

tools.name: audio.getTrackCollectionList
tools.description: This endpoint lists your collections of audio tracks and their basic attributes.

tools.name: audio.getTrackLicenseList
tools.description: This endpoint lists existing licenses. You can filter the results according to the track ID to see if you have an existing license for a specific track.

tools.name: audio.getTrackList
tools.description: This endpoint lists information about one or more audio tracks, including the description and publication date.

tools.name: audio.licenseTrack
tools.description: This endpoint gets licenses for one or more tracks. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: audio.listGenres
tools.description: This endpoint returns a list of all audio genres.

tools.name: audio.listInstruments
tools.description: This endpoint returns a list of all audio instruments.

tools.name: audio.listMoods
tools.description: This endpoint returns a list of all audio moods.

tools.name: audio.renameTrackCollection
tools.description: This endpoint sets a new name for a collection.

tools.name: audio.searchTracks
tools.description: This endpoint searches for tracks. If you specify more than one search parameter, the API uses an AND condition. Array parameters can be specified multiple times; in this case, the API uses an AND or an OR condition with those values, depending on the parameter.

tools.name: catalog.addToCollection
tools.description: This endpoint adds assets to a catalog collection. It also automatically adds the assets to the user's account's catalog.

tools.name: catalog.createCollection
tools.description: This endpoint creates a catalog collection and optionally adds assets. To add assets to the collection later, use `PATCH /v2/catalog/collections/{collection_id}/items`.

tools.name: catalog.deleteCollection
tools.description: This endpoint deletes a catalog collection. It does not remove the assets from the user's account's catalog.

tools.name: catalog.deleteFromCollection
tools.description: This endpoint removes assets from a catalog collection. It does not remove the assets from the user's account's catalog.

tools.name: catalog.getCollections
tools.description: This endpoint returns a list of catalog collections.

tools.name: catalog.searchCatalog
tools.description: This endpoint searches for assets in the account's catalog. If you specify more than one search parameter, the API uses an AND condition. Array parameters can be specified multiple times; in this case, the API uses an AND or an OR condition with those values, depending on the parameter. You can also filter search terms out in the `query` parameter by prefixing the term with NOT.

tools.name: catalog.updateCollection
tools.description: This endpoint updates the metadata of a catalog collection.

tools.name: computerVision.getKeywords
tools.description: This endpoint returns a list of suggested keywords for a media item that you specify or upload.

tools.name: computerVision.getSimilarImages
tools.description: This endpoint returns images that are visually similar to an image that you specify or upload.

tools.name: computerVision.getSimilarVideos
tools.description: This endpoint returns videos that are visually similar to an image that you specify or upload.

tools.name: computerVision.uploadEphemeralImage
tools.description: Deprecated; use `POST /v2/cv/images` instead. This endpoint uploads an image for reverse image search. The image must be in JPEG or PNG format. To get the search results, pass the ID that this endpoint returns to the `GET /v2/images/{id}/similar` endpoint.

tools.name: computerVision.uploadImage
tools.description: This endpoint uploads an image for reverse image or video search. Images must be in JPEG or PNG format. To get the search results, pass the upload ID that this endpoint returns to the GET /v2/cv/similar/images or GET /v2/cv/similar/videos endpoints. Contact us for access to this endpoint.

tools.name: contributors.getContributor
tools.description: This endpoint shows information about a single contributor, including contributor type, equipment they use, and other attributes.

tools.name: contributors.getContributorCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint lists the IDs of items in a contributor's collection and the date that each was added.

tools.name: contributors.getContributorCollections
tools.description: This endpoint gets more detailed information about a contributor's collection, including its cover image, timestamps for its creation, and most recent update. To get the items in collections, use GET /v2/contributors/{contributor_id}/collections/{id}/items.

tools.name: contributors.getContributorCollectionsList
tools.description: This endpoint lists collections based on contributor ID.

tools.name: contributors.getContributorList
tools.description: This endpoint lists information about one or more contributors, including contributor type, equipment they use and other attributes.

tools.name: customMusic.createAudioRenders
tools.description: This endpoint creates rendered audio from timeline data. It returns a render ID that you can use to download the finished audio when it is ready. The render ID is valid for up to 48 hours.

tools.name: customMusic.fetchRenders
tools.description: This endpoint shows the status of one or more audio renders, including download links for completed audio.

tools.name: customMusic.listCustomDescriptors
tools.description: This endpoint lists the descriptors that you can use in the audio regions in an audio render.

tools.name: customMusic.listCustomInstruments
tools.description: This endpoint lists the instruments that you can include in computer audio. If you specify more than one search parameter, the API uses an AND condition.

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialCategories
tools.description: Deprecated; use `GET /v2/editorial/images/categories` instead. This endpoint lists the categories that editorial images can belong to, which are separate from the categories that other types of assets can belong to.

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialImage
tools.description: This endpoint shows information about an editorial image, including a URL to a preview image and the sizes that it is available in.

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialImageLicenseList
tools.description: This endpoint lists existing editorial image licenses.

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialImageLivefeed
tools.description: Get editorial livefeed

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialImageLivefeedItems
tools.description: Get editorial livefeed items

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialImageLivefeedList
tools.description: Get editorial livefeed list

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialLivefeed
tools.description: Deprecated: use `GET /v2/editorial/images/livefeeds/{id}` instead to get an editorial livefeed.

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialLivefeedItems
tools.description: Deprecated; use `GET /v2/editorial/images/livefeeds/{id}/items` instead to get editorial livefeed items.

tools.name: editorialImages.getEditorialLivefeedList
tools.description: Deprecated; use `GET /v2/editorial/images/livefeeds` instead to get a list of editorial livefeeds.

tools.name: editorialImages.getUpdatedEditorialImage
tools.description: Deprecated; use `GET /v2/editorial/images/updated` instead to get recently updated items.

tools.name: editorialImages.getUpdatedEditorialImages
tools.description: This endpoint lists editorial images that have been updated in the specified time period to update content management systems (CMS) or digital asset management (DAM) systems. In most cases, use the date_updated_start and date_updated_end parameters to specify a range updates based on when the updates happened. You can also use the date_taken_start and date_taken_end parameters to specify a range of updates based on when the image was taken.

tools.name: editorialImages.getV2EditorialId
tools.description: Deprecated; use `GET /v2/editorial/images/{id}` instead to show information about an editorial image, including a URL to a preview image and the sizes that it is available in.

tools.name: editorialImages.licenseEditorialImage
tools.description: Deprecated; use `POST /v2/editorial/images/licenses` instead to get licenses for one or more editorial images. You must specify the country and one or more editorial images to license. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: editorialImages.licenseEditorialImages
tools.description: This endpoint gets licenses for one or more editorial images. You must specify the country and one or more editorial images to license. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: editorialImages.listEditorialImageCategories
tools.description: This endpoint lists the categories that editorial images can belong to, which are separate from the categories that other types of assets can belong to.

tools.name: editorialImages.searchEditorial
tools.description: Deprecated; use `GET /v2/editorial/images/search` instead to search for editorial images.

tools.name: editorialImages.searchEditorialImages
tools.description: This endpoint searches for editorial images. If you specify more than one search parameter, the API uses an AND condition. For example, if you set the `category` parameter to "Alone,Performing" and also specify a `query` parameter, the results include only images that match the query and are in both the Alone and Performing categories. You can also filter search terms out in the `query` parameter by prefixing the term with NOT.

tools.name: editorialVideo.getEditorialVideo
tools.description: This endpoint shows information about an editorial image, including a URL to a preview image and the sizes that it is available in.

tools.name: editorialVideo.getEditorialVideoLicenseList
tools.description: This endpoint lists existing editorial video licenses.

tools.name: editorialVideo.licenseEditorialVideo
tools.description: This endpoint gets licenses for one or more editorial videos. You must specify the country and one or more editorial videos to license. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: editorialVideo.listEditorialVideoCategories
tools.description: This endpoint lists the categories that editorial videos can belong to, which are separate from the categories that other types of assets can belong to.

tools.name: editorialVideo.searchEditorialVideos
tools.description: This endpoint searches for editorial videos. If you specify more than one search parameter, the API uses an AND condition. For example, if you set the `category` parameter to "Alone,Performing" and also specify a `query` parameter, the results include only videos that match the query and are in both the Alone and Performing categories.  You can also filter search terms out in the `query` parameter by prefixing the term with NOT.

tools.name: images.addImageCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint adds one or more images to a collection by image IDs.

tools.name: images.bulkSearchImages
tools.description: This endpoint runs up to 5 image searches in a single request and returns up to 20 results per search. You can provide global search parameters in the query parameters and override them for each search in the body parameter. The query and body parameters are the same as in the `GET /v2/images/search` endpoint.

tools.name: images.createImageCollection
tools.description: This endpoint creates one or more image collections (lightboxes). To add images to the collections, use `POST /v2/images/collections/{id}/items`.

tools.name: images.deleteImageCollection
tools.description: This endpoint deletes an image collection.

tools.name: images.deleteImageCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint removes one or more images from a collection.

tools.name: images.downloadImage
tools.description: This endpoint redownloads images that you have already received a license for. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: images.getFeaturedImageCollection
tools.description: This endpoint gets more detailed information about a featured collection, including its cover image and timestamps for its creation and most recent update. To get the images, use `GET /v2/images/collections/featured/{id}/items`.

tools.name: images.getFeaturedImageCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint lists the IDs of images in a featured collection and the date that each was added.

tools.name: images.getFeaturedImageCollectionList
tools.description: This endpoint lists featured collections of specific types and a name and cover image for each collection.

tools.name: images.getImage
tools.description: This endpoint shows information about an image, including a URL to a preview image and the sizes that it is available in.

tools.name: images.getImageCollection
tools.description: This endpoint gets more detailed information about a collection, including its cover image and timestamps for its creation and most recent update. To get the images in collections, use `GET /v2/images/collections/{id}/items`.

tools.name: images.getImageCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint lists the IDs of images in a collection and the date that each was added.

tools.name: images.getImageCollectionList
tools.description: This endpoint lists your collections of images and their basic attributes.

tools.name: images.getImageKeywordSuggestions
tools.description: This endpoint returns up to 10 important keywords from a block of plain text.

tools.name: images.getImageLicenseList
tools.description: This endpoint lists existing licenses.

tools.name: images.getImageList
tools.description: This endpoint lists information about one or more images, including the available sizes.

tools.name: images.getImageRecommendations
tools.description: This endpoint returns images that customers put in the same collection as the specified image IDs.

tools.name: images.getImageSuggestions
tools.description: This endpoint provides autocomplete suggestions for partial search terms.

tools.name: images.getUpdatedImages
tools.description: This endpoint lists images that have been updated in the specified time period to update content management systems (CMS) or digital asset management (DAM) systems. In most cases, use the `interval` parameter to show images that were updated recently, but you can also use the `start_date` and `end_date` parameters to specify a range of no more than three days. Do not use the `interval` parameter with either `start_date` or `end_date`.

tools.name: images.licenseImages
tools.description: This endpoint gets licenses for one or more images. You must specify the image IDs in the body parameter and other details like the format, size, and subscription ID either in the query parameter or with each image ID in the body parameter. Values in the body parameter override values in the query parameters. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: images.listImageCategories
tools.description: This endpoint lists the categories (Shutterstock-assigned genres) that images can belong to.

tools.name: images.listSimilarImages
tools.description: This endpoint returns images that are visually similar to an image that you specify.

tools.name: images.renameImageCollection
tools.description: This endpoint sets a new name for an image collection.

tools.name: images.searchImages
tools.description: This endpoint searches for images. If you specify more than one search parameter, the API uses an AND condition. Array parameters can be specified multiple times; in this case, the API uses an AND or an OR condition with those values, depending on the parameter. You can also filter search terms out in the `query` parameter by prefixing the term with NOT. Free API accounts show results only from a limited library of media, not the full Shutterstock media library. Also, the number of search fields they can use in a request is limited.

tools.name: oauth.authorize
tools.description: This endpoint returns a redirect URI (in the 'Location' header) that the customer uses to authorize your application and, together with POST /v2/oauth/access_token, generate an access token that represents that authorization.

tools.name: oauth.createAccessToken
tools.description: This endpoint returns an access token for the specified user and with the specified scopes. The token does not expire until the user changes their password. The body parameters must be encoded as form data.

tools.name: soundEffects.downloadSfx
tools.description: This endpoint redownloads sound effects that you have already received a license for. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: soundEffects.getSfxDetails
tools.description: This endpoint shows information about a sound effect.

tools.name: soundEffects.getSfxLicenseList
tools.description: This endpoint lists existing licenses.

tools.name: soundEffects.getSfxListDetails
tools.description: This endpoint shows information about sound effects.

tools.name: soundEffects.licensesSfx
tools.description: This endpoint licenses sounds effect assets.

tools.name: soundEffects.searchSfx
tools.description: This endpoint searches for sound effects. If you specify more than one search parameter, the API uses an AND condition.

tools.name: test.echo
tools.description: Echo text

tools.name: test.validate
tools.description: Validate input

tools.name: users.getAccessToken
tools.description: Get access token details

tools.name: users.getUser
tools.description: Get user details

tools.name: users.getUserSubscriptionList
tools.description: List user subscriptions

tools.name: videos.addVideoCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint adds one or more videos to a collection by video IDs.

tools.name: videos.createVideoCollection
tools.description: This endpoint creates one or more collections (clipboxes). To add videos to collections, use `POST /v2/videos/collections/{id}/items`.

tools.name: videos.deleteVideoCollection
tools.description: This endpoint deletes a collection.

tools.name: videos.deleteVideoCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint removes one or more videos from a collection.

tools.name: videos.downloadVideos
tools.description: This endpoint redownloads videos that you have already received a license for.

tools.name: videos.findSimilarVideos
tools.description: This endpoint searches for videos that are similar to a video that you specify.

tools.name: videos.getFeaturedVideoCollection
tools.description: This endpoint gets more detailed information about a featured video collection, including its cover video and timestamps for its creation and most recent update. To get the videos, use `GET /v2/videos/collections/featured/{id}/items`.

tools.name: videos.getFeaturedVideoCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint lists the IDs of videos in a featured collection and the date that each was added.

tools.name: videos.getFeaturedVideoCollectionList
tools.description: This endpoint lists featured video collections and a name and cover video for each collection.

tools.name: videos.getUpdatedVideos
tools.description: This endpoint lists videos that have been updated in the specified time period to update content management systems (CMS) or digital asset management (DAM) systems. In most cases, use the `interval` parameter to show videos that were updated recently, but you can also use the `start_date` and `end_date` parameters to specify a range of no more than three days. Do not use the `interval` parameter with either `start_date` or `end_date`.

tools.name: videos.getVideo
tools.description: This endpoint shows information about a video, including URLs to previews and the sizes that it is available in.

tools.name: videos.getVideoCollection
tools.description: This endpoint gets more detailed information about a collection, including the timestamp for its creation and the number of videos in it. To get the videos in collections, use GET /v2/videos/collections/{id}/items.

tools.name: videos.getVideoCollectionItems
tools.description: This endpoint lists the IDs of videos in a collection and the date that each was added.

tools.name: videos.getVideoCollectionList
tools.description: This endpoint lists your collections of videos and their basic attributes.

tools.name: videos.getVideoLicenseList
tools.description: This endpoint lists existing licenses.

tools.name: videos.getVideoList
tools.description: This endpoint lists information about one or more videos, including the aspect ratio and URLs to previews.

tools.name: videos.getVideoSuggestions
tools.description: This endpoint provides autocomplete suggestions for partial search terms.

tools.name: videos.licenseVideos
tools.description: This endpoint gets licenses for one or more videos. You must specify the video IDs in the body parameter and the size and subscription ID either in the query parameter or with each video ID in the body parameter. Values in the body parameter override values in the query parameters. The download links in the response are valid for 8 hours.

tools.name: videos.listVideoCategories
tools.description: This endpoint lists the categories (Shutterstock-assigned genres) that videos can belong to.

tools.name: videos.renameVideoCollection
tools.description: This endpoint sets a new name for a collection.

tools.name: videos.searchVideos
tools.description: This endpoint searches for videos. If you specify more than one search parameter, the API uses an AND condition. Array parameters can be specified multiple times; in this case, the API uses an AND or an OR condition with those values, depending on the parameter. You can also filter search terms out in the `query` parameter by prefixing the term with NOT.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
